settings.label: Artist / band name
settings.info: This will appear in the header and throughout the site

settings.label: Short bio (2-3 sentences)
settings.info: Used for SEO and press kit sections

settings.label: Press photo
settings.info: High-resolution photo for press and about sections

settings.label: Genre
settings.info: Primary music genre

settings.content: Riffride publishes your artist info as structured data (schema.org) so search engines can build a knowledge panel. MusicBrainz and Bandsintown can't be filled automatically — claim those profiles yourself, then paste the links here so they're included. Google decides if and when a panel appears.

settings.label: MusicBrainz artist ID
settings.info: From your claimed MusicBrainz profile. Used to enrich your structured data.

settings.label: MusicBrainz artist URL
settings.info: Format: https://musicbrainz.org/artist/YOUR-ID — added to your profile's verified links (sameAs).

settings.content: Pick a skin. Editorial (dark) and Editorial Light (light) both ship with this theme. The premium skins — Mono, Wax and Atelier — are sold separately as deeper standalone themes.

definition.label: Background gradient
definition.info: Visible if background image is not set

settings.content: These colors are used for musician-specific sections and override Dawn's color schemes in custom sections.

settings.label: Primary brand colour
settings.info: Main text and primary UI elements

settings.label: Accent / highlight colour
settings.info: CTAs, hover states, and badges

settings.label: Background colour
settings.info: Main background colour (dark theme default)

settings.label: Secondary colour
settings.info: Secondary text and subtle UI elements

settings.label: Heading font
settings.info: Used for headlines, artist name, and section titles

settings.label: Body font
settings.info: Used for body text, descriptions, and UI elements

settings.label: Display headings in uppercase
settings.info: Apply text-transform: uppercase to all headings

settings.label: Site layout mode
settings.info: Choose between a single-page scrolling experience or traditional multi-page navigation

settings.label: Hide navigation entirely
settings.info: Removes the navigation bar from the entire site. Useful for minimal single-page layouts.

settings.label: Spotify artist URL
settings.info: Your full Spotify artist profile URL

settings.label: Apple Music URL
settings.info: Your Apple Music artist profile URL

settings.label: Bandcamp URL
settings.info: Your Bandcamp profile or store URL

settings.label: SoundCloud URL
settings.info: Your SoundCloud profile URL

settings.label: Instagram URL
settings.info: Your Instagram profile URL

settings.label: YouTube URL
settings.info: Your YouTube channel URL

settings.label: TikTok URL
settings.info: Your TikTok profile URL

settings.label: Facebook URL
settings.info: Your Facebook page URL

settings.label: Twitter / X URL
settings.info: Your Twitter/X profile URL

settings.label: Bandsintown artist name
settings.info: Enter your artist name exactly as it appears on Bandsintown

settings.label: Linkfire smart link URL
settings.info: Paste your Linkfire link URL here (can be overridden per section)

settings.label: Feature.fm embed code
settings.info: Paste your Feature.fm widget embed code here

settings.content: Riffride earns by referring artists to the services they need. Drop in your affiliate / referral links below — sections and the setup guide will route through them with attribution. Leave blank to fall back to the plain destination.

settings.label: Partner / attribution ID
settings.info: Identifies the distribution partner this install came from (e.g. 'ditto'). Appended to outbound links as &partner=.

settings.label: Recommended POD provider
settings.info: Shown in the setup guide as the zero-inventory merch option.

settings.label: POD affiliate / referral link
settings.info: Your affiliate link to the chosen POD provider's signup.

settings.label: Recommended smart-link provider
settings.info: Default smart-link service recommended to the artist.

settings.label: Smart-link signup / referral link
settings.info: Your affiliate link to the chosen smart-link provider's signup.

settings.label: Disco.ac referral link
settings.info: Used by the private press kit for sharing assets.

settings.label: Shopify referral link
settings.info: Used only for 'Powered by' / share links. Main Shopify-signup attribution belongs on your marketing site, not here.

settings.label: Google Analytics 4 measurement ID
settings.info: Format: G-XXXXXXXXXX

settings.label: Meta (Facebook) Pixel ID
settings.info: Your Facebook Pixel ID for conversion tracking

settings.label: TikTok Pixel ID
settings.info: Your TikTok Pixel ID for ad tracking

settings.label: Google Search Console verification code
settings.info: Paste the content value from your Google verification meta tag

settings.label: Bing Webmaster Tools verification code
settings.info: Paste the content value from your Bing verification meta tag

settings.label: Show theme credit in footer
settings.info: Display 'Built with Riffride' credit link in footer. Required on the free theme; can be turned off on the paid version.
